---

name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a feature
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
body:
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Describe the feature
      description: What would you like to see
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Why is it useful
      description: What problem does it solve
    validations:
      required: true
